subcodes.first_line: O wanderer in the Friend's domain! The letter addressed to Aqa Mahdi hath been received and perused. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته کوی دوست مکتوب مرسول مخاطبا لاقا مهدی ملاحظه و مطالعه گردید حمد خدا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @martyrs and martyrdom
